metadata.description: Complete inventory of Berry family reference documents and records

documents.title: Robert Berry's Will — Princess Anne County, 1730
documents.summary: Full transcription of Robert Berry's will from Princess Anne County, Virginia. Names wife Mary and sons Richard and Robert Jr. Witnessed by Bartholomew Williamson and Sarah Mathyas.

documents.title: Robert Berry's Will — Orange County, NC
documents.summary: Will of Robert Berry of Orange County, North Carolina, with original document images. Two images: transcript page and original will copy.

documents.title: Richard Williamson's Will — Princess Anne County
documents.summary: Will of Richard Williamson naming wife Mary Kempe and seven children including daughter Mary who married Robert Berry. Names grandchildren Mary Williamson and Caleb Whitehurst.
documents.ancestor_family: Williamson family — maternal line of Gen 1

documents.title: Roger Williamson & Ann Foster Williamson
documents.summary: Family history and will of Ann Foster Williamson Carroway covering the earliest Williamson generation in Princess Anne County. Roger Williamson married Ann Foster c.1646, died c.1650. Ann remarried John Carroway.

documents.title: Land Grant to Robert Berry Jr. — Alabama, 1824
documents.summary: Original land grant certificate issued by President Monroe granting Alabama land to Robert Berry Jr.

documents.title: Deed Book Page 331 — Person County, NC
documents.summary: Deed recording a land purchase by Robert Berry Jr. in Person County, North Carolina.

documents.title: Deed Book Page 421
documents.summary: Deed recording land sold by Robert Berry Jr.

documents.title: Joshua Berry — Deed, 1811
documents.summary: Collection of Joshua Berry documents: marriage bond to Nancy Ellison, 1811 deed from Robert Berry to Joshua, 1828 deed of trust, and newspaper account of Joshua Berry's murder in 1838.

documents.title: Thomas Berry Land Sale — 1806
documents.summary: Original image of the 1806 land sale document for Thomas Berry.

documents.title: David J. Berry — Georgia Land Documents
documents.summary: Detailed narrative record of David J. Berry's Georgia land transactions — deeds, land lotteries, tax digests, and land lot transfers. Covers Berry family migration from Orange County NC through Fayette, Henry, Cobb, and Milton Counties, Georgia. Authored by George Pettett.

documents.title: Berry Wills & Deeds — PAC, 1691–1755
documents.summary: Twelve Berry entries abstracted from Princess Anne County deed books by Anne Mailing — wills, deeds, and property records spanning six decades. Includes the 1704 Virginia Quit Rent Rolls listing three Berrys.

documents.title: Williamson Deeds & Wills — PAC, 1691–1755
documents.summary: Extensive abstracts of Williamson family deeds, wills, inventories, and appraisals from Princess Anne County deed books 1–7 by Anne Mailing. Over 40 entries covering multiple Williamson generations. Includes 1704 Virginia Quit Rent Rolls.
documents.ancestor_family: Williamson family — maternal line of Gen 1

documents.title: Relatives Found in PAC Deed Books
documents.summary: Names and detailed deed transcriptions for Kempe, Williamson, Berry, Whitehurst, and allied families from Princess Anne County deed books 19–21. Includes deeds for Richard and Catherine Berry, Willoughby Berry, Jesse Berry, and multiple Kempe and Williamson entries.
documents.ancestor_family: Berry & Williamson families — Princess Anne County

documents.title: William Cate's Estate Sale — 1803
documents.summary: Detailed inventory of William Cate's estate sale showing items purchased by Robert Berry Sr., Elizabeth Berry, Robert Berry Jr., Joshua Berry, Thomas Berry, and William Berry. Includes photograph of playing cards possibly from the sale.

documents.title: Camp Power of Attorney — Jackson County, GA
documents.summary: Power of attorney from Jackson County, Georgia, signed January 14, 1815 by children of Mary Berry Camp (daughter of Robert Berry Sr.) granting Joseph Camp authority over estate matters. Later signed over to Henry Berry in December 1816. Source: NC Archives CR.073.928.5.

documents.title: Revolutionary War Vouchers — Robert Berry
documents.summary: Ten numbered Revolutionary War vouchers (#1501–1512) documenting Robert Berry's military service payments and dates. Robert Berry was a private in the North Carolina Continental Line. Includes census information references.

documents.title: Robert Berry's Continental Army Pay Vouchers
documents.summary: Continental Army pay vouchers with original images, plus army provisions purchase record for 200 pounds of beef purchased by Alex Mebane (Orange County comptroller) from Robert Berry. Includes context about General Nathaniel Greene's campaign and the Battle of Guilford Courthouse (March 15, 1781).

documents.title: Berry Marriage Bonds
documents.summary: Complete table of Berry marriage bonds from the grooms book — 31 marriages from 1791 to 1895 with bride names, dates, and bondsmen. Plus additional marriages not in the grooms book through 1900.
documents.ancestor_family: Robert & Elizabeth Cate Berry (Gen 2) — multiple generations

documents.title: Orange County NC Marriage Bonds A–C
documents.summary: Comprehensive marriage bond index from Orange County NC contributed by Betty Mayes for USGenWeb Archives. Berry-specific entries indexed by groom's name with bride and bondsman, followed by full alphabetical listings A through C.
documents.ancestor_family: Robert & Elizabeth Cate Berry (Gen 2) — multiple generations

documents.title: Jesse Waldo Maners — Marriage Certificate
documents.summary: Marriage certificate for Jesse Waldo Maners and Velma Irene Morgan, plus WWII draft registration image. Includes biographical details through Guilford County NC and Anderson County SC.
documents.ancestor_family: David J. Berry line → Jesse Lee Berry → Addie Lena Berry Maners

documents.title: Martin Adolphus Maners — Marriage Certificate
documents.summary: Marriage certificate for Martin Adolphus Maners and Annie Marie Smith (December 24, 1938), WWII draft registration, and 1939 High Point city directory entry for Maners family.
documents.ancestor_family: David J. Berry line → Jesse Lee Berry → Addie Lena Berry Maners

documents.title: Herman F. Maners Jr. — Marriage Record
documents.summary: Marriage record for Herman Fanton Maners Jr. and Mazie Myrtle Anderson, plus draft registration image and William Thomas Maners death certificate.
documents.ancestor_family: David J. Berry line → Jesse Lee Berry → Addie Lena Berry Maners

documents.title: Alexander Cates — Death Certificate
documents.summary: Death certificate for Alexander Cates, died February 6, 1923, Jonesboro, Clayton County, Georgia. Lists father as William Abraham Cates and mother as Sarah Berry. Page also includes marriage records, census data, and headstone photographs for the Cates family in Georgia and Texas.
documents.ancestor_family: Robert & Elizabeth Cate Berry (Gen 2) — through daughter Sarah Berry who married William Cates

documents.title: Jesse Lee Berry — Death Certificate
documents.summary: Death certificate for Jesse Lee Berry, died April 10, 1924, Columbus, Muscogee County, Georgia. Sister Mrs. J.S. McVickers signed. Page includes five federal census images (1880–1920), family photographs, land records, gravestone photos, and children's group photograph.
documents.ancestor_family: David J. Berry line → Robert & Elizabeth Everett Berry

documents.title: Herman Fantom Maners — Death Certificate
documents.summary: Death certificate for Herman Fantom Maners (b. June 5, 1886, d. June 2, 1967). Page covers Addie Lena Berry Maners with family photographs, WWI draft registration, city directory, 50th wedding anniversary photos, and gravestone photographs.
documents.ancestor_family: David J. Berry line → Jesse Lee Berry → Addie Lena Berry Maners

documents.title: Ruby A. Berry — Death Record
documents.summary: Death record for Ruby A. Shockey Berry, wife of James Alexander Berry. Page is the Willie Howell Berry biography with family photographs spanning five to seven generations, headstone photo, census references (1900–1930), and a memoir by granddaughter Joyce Clark Foster.
documents.ancestor_family: Robert Berry Jr. line → George Berry → John Berry → Alexander Howell Berry → Willie Howell Berry

documents.title: Elizabeth Berry — Death Date Document
documents.summary: Documents establishing death date of Elizabeth Berry (d.1815 Person County NC). Page includes bastardy bond against William Riley (1791), transcripts from Person County records, letter from Auburn Alabama (1862) regarding heir Preston W. Berry, and Robert Berry's 1812 will references.

documents.title: Berry Brothers
documents.summary: Berry brothers family record (PDF download).

documents.title: Dan R. Berry Family
documents.summary: Dan R. Berry family record (PDF download).

documents.title: D.T. Cates Kids
documents.summary: D.T. Cates children family record (PDF download).

documents.title: Edna Hannah Family
documents.summary: Edna Hannah family record (PDF download).

documents.title: Etta Emma Berry and Children
documents.summary: Etta Emma Berry and children family record (PDF download).

documents.title: Martha Berry Wrenn
documents.summary: Martha Berry Wrenn family record (PDF download).

documents.title: Thomas and Lucy's Grandchildren
documents.summary: Record of Thomas and Lucy Berry's grandchildren (PDF download).

documents.title: Book Addendum
documents.summary: Supplemental addendum to the family genealogy book (PDF download).

documents.title: Joshua Berry Sr. — Census Records
documents.summary: Five federal census records (1790–1830) from Orange County, North Carolina with original images. Joshua was killed in 1838; widow Nancy appears in 1840 and 1850.

documents.title: Joshua Berry Jr. — Census Records
documents.summary: Six census images spanning Ohio and Iowa — 1830 Gallia County OH, 1840–1860 Benton County IA, plus 1856 Iowa state census and 1880 entry for son Joseph Berry with widow Anna Thorpe Berry.

documents.title: 1790 Census Index
documents.summary: Tax records from National Archives (RG-29) for Orange County NC (1790 census was lost). Indexed entries for John Berry, Joshua Berry, Robert Berry, and Robert Berry Jr.

documents.title: 1800 Orange County NC Census
documents.summary: Census images showing Robert Berry Sr., Robert Berry Jr., Joshua Berry, David J. Berry, William Berry, and Thomas Berry in Orange County NC, with household details.

documents.title: 1810 Hannah Cate Census
documents.summary: Census image of Hannah Cate Berry's household and Robert Berry Sr.'s household sharing the same 1810 Orange County NC census page. Lists all household members and ages.

documents.title: Census Pages Index
documents.summary: Master index linking to census records for Berry family members across multiple states and decades. Currently links to 1800 and 1810 Orange County NC census pages.

documents.title: Census Page for Thomas Berry
documents.summary: Federal census images for Thomas Berry from Orange County NC. The 1800 census was the only US census in which Thomas Berry was ever listed. Includes 1810 Hannah Cate Berry census where Thomas's wife Sarah Cate Berry was enumerated.

documents.title: Census Page for Thomas P. Berry
documents.summary: Five federal census images (1810, 1850, 1860, 1870, 1880) from Orange County NC with full household transcriptions. Includes detailed narrative of Thomas Person Berry's three marriages and the property lawsuit after Lucy Brown Berry's death.

documents.title: Robert Berry Jr. Census Page
documents.summary: Census images from 1790, 1800, 1810 Person County NC and 1830, 1840 Fayette County, Alabama. Shows Robert Berry Jr. and wife Mary Waggoner Berry's migration south.

documents.title: Ira Berry Census Page
documents.summary: Census images from 1850 Orange County NC, 1860 Morganfield KY, and 1870 Kentucky for Ira's widow Nancy Wynn Berry. Includes parents Lewis and Sally Toler Berry's 1850 census. Ira likely killed during the Civil War.

documents.title: William Berry — Son of Robert & Elizabeth
documents.category: Family Records with Census & Vital Documents
documents.summary: Comprehensive family record for William Berry with marriage bond image (1799), 1800 and 1830 census images, detailed children's table, and narrative tracing William's disappearance and Hannah Cate Berry's single parenthood.

documents.title: William & Hannah Cate Berry's Children
documents.category: Family Records with Census & Vital Documents
documents.summary: Index of the three surviving sons of William and Hannah Cate Berry — William Clarence, Robert C., and Thomas Person Berry — with birth, death, and marriage information.

documents.title: William Clarence Berry — NC, AL, TX
documents.category: Family Records with Census & Vital Documents
documents.summary: Detailed family biography with census records (1810–1870), two Orange County NC deeds (1830, 1833), and marriage bond. Traces migration from NC to Fayette County Alabama to Burnet County Texas. Lists all 12 children from two marriages.

documents.title: William G. Berry — Son of David J. Berry
documents.category: Family Records with Census & Vital Documents
documents.summary: Six federal census records (1830–1880) fully transcribed from Fayette County GA through Atlanta. Confederate service in Phillips Legion (21st GA Infantry). Lists 12 children. Jane Beck Berry (wife) was a washerwoman listed as head of household by 1880.

documents.title: William Oscar Berry — Georgia
documents.category: Family Records with Census & Vital Documents
documents.summary: Six federal census images (1880–1940) with original document scans from Etowah AL, Henry County GA, and Muscogee County GA, plus gravestone photographs. Includes Jesse Lee Berry's children group photo.
documents.ancestor_family: David J. Berry line → Robert & Elizabeth Everett Berry → Jesse Lee Berry

documents.title: William Henry Berry — Georgia
documents.category: Family Records with Census & Vital Documents
documents.summary: Biographical record of William Henry Berry with two wives (Matilda Starke and Permilla Ann Fowler) and ten children born during the Civil War era in Fayette County GA. Confederate Army service.
documents.ancestor_family: David J. Berry line → Robert & Elizabeth Everett Berry

documents.title: William Edgar Berry — Alabama
documents.category: Family Records with Census & Vital Documents
documents.summary: Family record of William Edgar Berry (b.1862, d.1949 Birmingham AL), married Carrie Alford. Two sons: Cuyler Cleo Berry and Carlton Berry. Includes photograph and descendants list.
documents.ancestor_family: David J. Berry line → Robert & Elizabeth Everett Berry → William Henry Berry

documents.title: William Eugene Berry — North Carolina
documents.category: Family Records with Census & Vital Documents
documents.summary: WWI-era military photograph, 50th wedding anniversary photo, and family photograph with parents. 1930 Orange County NC census reference. Son of Wiley P. and Ida Ann Wilson Berry.
documents.ancestor_family: William & Hannah Cate Berry line → Thomas Person Berry → John Robert Berry → Wiley P. Berry

documents.title: William H Berry — North Carolina
documents.category: Family Records with Census & Vital Documents
documents.summary: Marriage record documentation, gravestone photographs from Fiddleton Cemetery (Mary King, Susan Crabtree), and Susan King Crabtree death certificate revealing the King-Berry family connection through Henry Berry's daughter.
documents.ancestor_family: William & Hannah Cate Berry line → Thomas Person Berry

documents.title: Willie Adolphus Berry — North Carolina
documents.category: Family Records with Census & Vital Documents
documents.summary: Three federal census records (1910–1930) from Person County NC, family photographs of three Berry brothers (W.P., Willie Adolphus, Thomas Euart), and photo of Willie and Fannie Berry. Ten children listed.
documents.ancestor_family: William & Hannah Cate Berry line → Thomas Person Berry → John Robert Berry

documents.title: William Aaron Turley — Georgia
documents.category: Family Records with Census & Vital Documents
documents.summary: 1880 census reference and early 1920s family photographs from Georgia and Alabama. William Aaron Turley married Emma Allena Berry, granddaughter of Robert and Elizabeth Everett Berry.
documents.ancestor_family: David J. Berry line → Robert & Elizabeth Everett Berry → Mary J. Berry Turley

documents.title: William Lamar Berry — Georgia to Rhode Island
documents.category: Family Records with Census & Vital Documents
documents.summary: 1910 federal census from Muscogee County GA showing William Lamar Berry age 2 with parents. DNA project participant #35 (Dane Berry). Related to Margaret Mitchell's family through Nannie Verna Mitchell.
documents.ancestor_family: David J. Berry line → Robert & Elizabeth Everett Berry → Jesse Lee Berry → Albert Edgar Berry

documents.title: William Thomas Berry Sr. — Alabama
documents.category: Family Records with Census & Vital Documents
documents.summary: 1920 and 1930 federal census records from Walker County AL and Arkansas. William Thomas Berry Sr. died 1912 from appendicitis. Traces family through second marriage (Louisa Minns to Charley Burbol) and migration to Arkansas.
documents.ancestor_family: Robert Berry Jr. line → Thompson Berry → Henry Bradford Berry

documents.title: William Thomas Berry Jr. — Alabama to Ohio
documents.category: Family Records with Census & Vital Documents
documents.summary: Biographical record tracing family migration from Corona, Alabama to Arkansas to Cleveland/Oakwood Village, Ohio. William Thomas Berry Jr. married Mattie Lee Herrin. Six children listed.
documents.ancestor_family: Robert Berry Jr. line → Thompson Berry → Henry Bradford Berry → William Thomas Berry Sr.

documents.title: Lela Willie Virginia Guthrie — Texas
documents.category: Family Records with Census & Vital Documents
documents.summary: Four federal census records (1900–1930) from Rusk County TX, plus family photograph. Lela married Lonzo (Lonnie) Joseph Hunt. Connected to Berry family through Mary Berry Barton → Joshua Crow → Thomas Guthrie.
documents.ancestor_family: David J. Berry line → Thomas Howard & Mary Berry Barton → Joshua Crow → Thomas Guthrie

documents.title: William Thomas Maners — Georgia & North Carolina
documents.category: Family Records with Census & Vital Documents
documents.summary: WWII draft registration image, death certificate image, family photograph, and census records (1930 Griffin GA, 1940 High Point NC). Named for paternal grandfather. Married Vera Mae Westbrooks c.1929.
documents.ancestor_family: David J. Berry line → Jesse Lee Berry → Addie Lena Berry Maners

documents.title: Fiddleton Cemetery
documents.summary: Cemetery visitation records from July 21, 2007 reunion with headstone photographs and inscription details for 18+ Berry ancestors. GPS coordinates: N36 13'42" W79 01'07". Only 6 headstones had legible inscriptions; approximately 23 graves total.
documents.ancestor_family: Robert & Elizabeth Cate Berry (Gen 2) — multiple generations

documents.title: Cora and Frank Breeze's Headstone
documents.summary: Headstone photograph of Cora and Frank Breeze.
documents.ancestor_family: John Robert Berry line — Cora Berry married A. Frank Breeze

documents.title: Robert H. Breeze's Headstone
documents.summary: Headstone photograph of Robert H. Breeze.

documents.title: Fiddleton 1891 — Historical Map
documents.summary: Historical map of northern Orange County c.1891 showing Fiddleton Homestead, J.R. Berry Home, Berry's Grove Baptist Church, and Meridith Post Office. Published by George W. Tate from actual surveys. Includes modern Google Maps and 1997 USGS topo comparisons. Source: UNC North Carolina Collection.
